name: Yemistes Domates Me Avga (Stuffed Tomatoes W
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the potatoes and boil until just tender. Let cool.
2. Peel the potatoes and place on a platter.
3. Cut 6 very thin slices from the Kefalotiri cheese and grate the rest.
4. Wash the tomatoes and cut off the tops, removing the pulp. Pass through a strainer and reserve.
5. Salt and pepper the tomato cases to drain.
6. Place the potatoes into the prepared tomatoes.
7. Drizzle some olive oil over the top and sprinkle with part of the grated cheese.
8. Pour the remaining oil and reserved tomato mixture into the pan.
9. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
10. Bake for 15 minutes.
11. Remove from oven.
12. Spoon some oil from the pan onto each tomato, then place a slice of cheese on top.
13. Break an egg on each tomato without breaking the yolk.
14. Sprinkle the eggs with salt, pepper, remaining cheese, and bread crumbs.
15. Return to oven for another 15 minutes at 300°F (150°C).
16. Serve immediately.
